title: Fix up libpod.conf man pages and referencese to it.
body:
Remove podman --config option, since it does not do anything.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I figured I would open a PR for the less controversial parts of https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1406
I think we should just implement `--config` - I know this worked originally, but it might have been broken around the original Varlink changes.
Just need a `GlobalIsSet("config")` and if it is set, call `NewRuntimeFromConfig` instead of `NewRuntime`
We are getting weird spurious failures.

:pushpin: Commit eaea690 has been approved by `mheon`
